page: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the Eadsv7 family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9V45 processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture. The server features 32 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 16 physical cores with multithreading enabled. It operates at a clock speed of 4.5 GHz and includes 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a 1890 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier single-core performance, with stress-ng single-core CPU, gzip compression, and bzip3 decompression single-threaded tests all scoring in the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth fall into the average range. The CPU's extended instruction set capabilities, including AVX-512 and cryptography acceleration, contribute to strong PassMark CPU and encryption scores in the top 25%.

This hardware profile is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, database operations, and data processing tasks that benefit from large memory capacities and fast single-threaded performance. However, multi-threaded decompression and large-scale LLM text generation show performance limitations, with 70B model text generation scoring in the bottom 10%. The presence of 1890 GB of local storage makes it highly capable for caching and temporary database storage, offering a balanced resource density for enterprise applications without GPU requirements.
description: The Microsoft Azure E32ads_v7 is an x86_64 memory-optimized virtual machine from the Eadsv7 family, powered by a 32-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz. It features 16 physical cores, 256.0 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability. Benchmarks show top-tier single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression speeds, alongside strong cryptography and PassMark CPU scores. While multi-core processing and memory bandwidth perform at average levels, the instance's high memory-to-vCPU ratio and local storage capacity make it highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, database hosting, and enterprise applications. It lacks GPU acceleration, and large-scale LLM text generation is a notable performance tradeoff.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring a 32-vCPU AMD EPYC processor, 256 GB of RAM, and 1890 GB of local storage, designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E32ads_v7 is a memory-optimized server with 32 vCPUs, 256 GB RAM, and 1890 GB local storage, powered by an AMD EPYC processor.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated AMD EPYC processing, high-capacity local storage, and top-tier single-core performance.
bullet_points: Powered by a 32-vCPU AMD EPYC 9V45 processor running at 4.5 GHz
Equipped with 256 GB of RAM and 1890 GB of local storage
Top-tier single-core CPU and single-threaded compression performance
Supports advanced vector extensions and cryptographic acceleration
Optimized for memory-intensive databases and enterprise applications
